_note: Real market reference values seeded from Trace_Core nl_housing_timeseries.json (Cala-derived). Every anchor carries evidence_id + source_name. Personal Fit uses these as context; the user supplies their own budget/down-payment/quoted-rate. NO mortgage-rate LEVEL exists in the timeseries (only ecb_deposit_rate) -> quoted_mortgage_rate is a USER INPUT.

nhg_limit_eur.source_name: Limit for a National Mortgage Guarantee to be raised to 450,000 euros

transfer_tax_ftb_ceiling_eur.source_name: Dutch Transfer Tax Exemption for First-Time Buyers Increases to 555,000

ecb_deposit_rate_pct.source_name: Your borrowing power for a mortgage in the Netherlands in 2025

bank_price_forecast_2026_pct.source_name: Housing Market Quarterly: House prices will rise slightly this year (Rabobank revised)

single_buyer_extra_capacity_eur.source_name: Dutch housing market update: what is changing in 2025 - DutchNews

housing_shortage_homes.source_name: Why is there a housing shortage in the Netherlands?

box3_effective_wealth_tax_pct.source_name: Property Investment in the Netherlands: Income Tax guide

price_drift_scenarios_pct._note: Annualized price drift per market state, sourced from real bank forecasts; used to bound opportunity-cost-of-waiting. Weighted at runtime by the engine's real candidate_support distribution.

regional_divergence.basis: national forecast floor (region-specific not in fixtures)
